_comment: Workspace root config for skill-graph tooling. Post-2026-05-16 monorepo split, this repo is tooling-only — the canonical skill library lives in the sibling jacob-balslev/skills repo. This config points lint, manifest, drift, route, and eval truth_source resolution at that sibling so `npm run verify` works from a fresh clone without setting SKILL_GRAPH_WORKSPACE.
_assumed_layout: Sibling clones at the same parent directory: ~/Development/skill-graph (this repo) + ~/Development/skills (canonical skills). If your layout differs, set SKILL_GRAPH_WORKSPACE to override workspaceRoot() or copy this file and edit skill_roots.
